title: enceliopsis nutans
intro: Enceliopsis nutans, also known as the nodding or drooping sunflower, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Enceliopsis nutans include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Enceliopsis nutans can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
